app.sessionTimeoutMessage: The 20-minute time limit has been reached. Your session has ended.
app.serverRestartMessage: The server was restarted and your session was ended.
app.sessionCompleteMessage: Session complete. Thank you for your work!
app.thankYouMessage: Thank you for participating. Please notify the experimenter.
app.endSessionTitle: End session and return to home (admin only)

login.title: Cooperative Design Optimization Study
login.subtitle: Please enter your participant ID and password to begin.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.deleteConfirm: Delete user "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
admin.passwordMinError: Password must be at least 6 characters

sessionSetup.noTaskAssigned: No task has been assigned to you yet. Please contact the experimenter.
sessionSetup.selectCondition: Select a condition and web app to test.

taskDescriptions.task_tutorial: Design a simple personal web page. Adjust two parameters (image count and animation level) to maximize page load speed and user experience rating. Use this task to practice the workflow.
taskDescriptions.task_sns: Design the feed and notification settings for a social network service (SNS). Your goal is to maximize daily revenue from ad monetization and user satisfaction rating. These two objectives often conflict: more ads and notifications boost revenue but hurt user experience.
taskDescriptions.task_qa: Design the layout and content settings for a Q&A message board. Your goal is to maximize the answering rate of questions and the total number of questions answered. These two objectives can conflict: broader categories and lower activity thresholds attract more answerers but may lower per-question answering quality.

evaluate.title: Evaluate
evaluate.informalDescription: Fast probe (~3 s). Returns a quick estimate with higher noise. Good for rapid exploration.
evaluate.formalDescription: Precise measurement (~20 s). Low noise, high confidence. Use when you want reliable data.

setParameters.title: Set Parameters
setParameters.aiGreeting: Hello! Describe what you want from the layout and I'll ask the AI to suggest an optimized design.
setParameters.aiLocked: 🔒 AI is locked until 5 formal evaluations are completed.
setParameters.askPlaceholder: e.g. 'make it more readable with larger text'

checkResults.title: Check & Analyze Results
checkResults.clickHint: — click a point to restore its parameters
checkResults.noEvaluations:
No evaluations yet.
Run an evaluation to see results.

webpageNews.heading: Cooperative Design Optimization
webpageNews.description:
Jointly explore the design space with an AI assistant to find layouts
that maximise speed and accuracy.
webpageNews.article1Summary: Exploring how layout parameters affect task performance and user satisfaction in HCI research.
webpageNews.article2Summary: Cooperative BO allows humans and AI to jointly navigate design spaces with minimal evaluations.
webpageNews.article3Summary: Noisy informal feedback combined with precise formal measurements drives efficient convergence.
